title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude Fable 5 completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots without maps or navigation aids. This demonstrates improved multimodal vision capabilities compared to earlier Claude models which required helper infrastructure.
writeup: This video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots, with no maps or navigation aids supplied. It matters as a concrete benchmark for multimodal vision: earlier Claude models needed helper infrastructure to play, while this run relied on vision alone. The takeaway is that the model now parses game state and navigates directly from pixels, indicating improved computer vision and multimodal capabilities.
